concerns.text: SC-003 cites 'See FR-007, US-3'. FR-007 is a statistical correction (Bonferroni) for hypothesis testing, not the validation metric itself. SC-003 measures the correlation coefficient (R²) for external validation, which is primarily served by US-3 and FR-005 (ANOVA) or the general validation logic in US-3. The link to FR-007 is weak/misleading as FR-007 does not define the R² metric. Consider re-anchoring to US-3 directly or clarifying the role of FR-007 in this specific metric.

SC-004 cites 'See FR-002, US-1'. FR-002 is strictly about computing descriptors (feature engineering). While part of the pipeline, the 'total wall-clock time for the full pipeline' (ingestion, training, analysis) is a system-level constraint not explicitly defined in FR-002. FR-002 only covers the feature engineering step. This SC is orphaned from a specific FR that defines the *total* pipeline time limit, though it is covered by the scope of US-1, US-2, and US-3 collectively. A dedicated FR for pipeline performance or a clearer anchor to the collective user stories is needed.

SC-005 cites 'See FR-004, US-2'. FR-004 defines the data split strategy (70/15/15). It does not define memory usage constraints. The memory limit (7 GB) is a system constraint mentioned in the 'Independent Test' of US-2 and the 'Assumptions' section, but no FR explicitly mandates the system to stay within this limit or defines the memory behavior. SC-005 is orphaned from the FR list regarding the specific constraint definition.
